scripts.gen:policy: pnpm --filter @shieldgate/policy build && uv --directory apps/backend run datamodel-codegen --input ../../packages/policy/schema/policy.schema.json --input-file-type jsonschema --output src/shieldgate/generated/models.py --output-model-type pydantic_v2.BaseModel --target-python-version 3.12 --disable-timestamp
